prompt:
A researcher claims that annual rainfall in City reservoir levels rose steadily from 2019 to 2024.

choices.text: Almost all of the change happened between 2019 and 2021, with little movement afterward.
choices.rationale: The value changes in every year shown, not just the first span.

choices.text: The value changed by the same amount every year, a constant 13 millimeters per year.
choices.rationale: The year-to-year changes vary, so the change was not a constant 13 millimeters.

choices.text: Across all 6 years shown, the value climbed from 270 to 337 millimeters.
choices.rationale: Correct. This matches the steady, one-direction trend the claim describes across every year shown.

choices.text: The value climbed by more than 30 millimeters in a single year.
choices.rationale: The largest one-year change was only 20 millimeters.

explanation: The supporting statement must reflect the table's actual, consistent trend across all the years shown.

table.caption: Annual rainfall in City reservoir levels (millimeters)
